# Strategy — {{Client Name}}

## The bet

One sentence. If this project works, it's because we bet correctly on ___.

> {{e.g. "A clearer one-liner and a pricing teaser will cut 'is this for me?'
> confusion, which is the #1 reason prospects bounce."}}

---

## Approach

How we're going to execute. 3–5 bullets max.

1. {{e.g. "Rewrite the hero against the primary persona's actual words."}}
2. {{e.g. "Move proof (logos, testimonials) above services — they want legitimacy first."}}
3. {{e.g. "Build a block-theme style guide so client can extend to other pages themselves."}}
4. {{e.g. "Keep the current CMS (WordPress) — no replatform."}}
5. {{}}

---

## Guardrails

Things we will not do, even if asked mid-project.

- {{e.g. "No hero video — site already loads slowly."}}
- {{e.g. "No carousel — they don't convert for this audience."}}
- {{e.g. "No stock photography of people — feels generic for a premium service."}}

---

## Risks & mitigations

| Risk | Mitigation |
|---|---|
| {{e.g. Client's brand guide is dated}} | {{We propose a light refresh in Phase 03 (System)}} |
| {{e.g. No real photography}} | {{Use illustrative system; flag stock as last resort}} |
| {{e.g. Decision-maker not on discovery call}} | {{Schedule mid-project review before Phase 04}} |

---

## What "done" looks like

The concrete deliverables, in the client's language.

- [ ] High-fidelity home page mock (HTML, deployable)
- [ ] Block theme style guide (HTML + `theme.json`)
- [ ] Strategy document (this playbook, customized)
- [ ] Zipped package, deployable to GH Pages or handed to dev
- [ ] {{client-specific}}

---

## Open strategic questions

To resolve in Phase 01 Intake, not by guessing.

- [ ] {{e.g. "Is pricing shown on the home page or gated?"}}
- [ ] {{e.g. "Single CTA or dual CTA in the hero?"}}
- [ ] {{}}
